title: Harris Ultimate Walls & Ceilings Blade No Loss Paint Brush | 1"
features: This 1" Blade Walls & Ceilings paint brush has been specifically designed and developed to give a neat, precise edge when cutting in around light switches, plug sockets and other detailed areas
Features Harris's unique Blade Technology. With one dip of paint the tapered head gives you edges as thin as a blade, giving you the control you need to deal with the tricky bits.
Lightly rinse brush head before use to remove any dust. Clean with warm water, leave to dry before storage
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Harris Ultimate Walls & Ceilings Blade Paint Brush 1in Contains 1 x Harris Ultimate Walls & Ceilings Blade Paint Brush 1in After use with water based paints, such as emulsion, remove the excess paint and wash in warm soapy water, or rinse in clean running water or cleaning fluids. Then immediately dry thoroughly *Bristle loss may occur if left to soak or if left in a damp area. For use when cutting in around light switches, plug sockets and other detailed areas. This paint brush has been specifically designed and engineered to get the ultimate finish on walls and ceilings using emulsion paints. Neat Edges + Precision. Featuring our unique Blade Technology*. With one dip of paint the tapered head gives you edges as thin as a blade giving you the control and precision you need to deal with the tricky bits. No Bristle Loss*. For use with emulsion paints. Suggested use For use when cutting in around light switches, plug sockets and other detailed areas. For best results, rinse brush head before use to remove any dust. Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier
